subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which hath been sent down in truth unto one of God's near-serving servants. Verily, it hath been revealed in truth, and it is indeed a revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق لعبد من عباد الله المقربین انه قد نزل بالحق و انه لتنزیل
subcodes.subjects: @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @power of the Manifestation of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @station of the Manifestation of God
